package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsHttpClientCreatedPerCall() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_network_calls_http_client_created_per_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Network calls. Flag http.Client construction per call instead of reusing clients and transports."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
